name: Stanford Pines
description:

Request!!<3<3

It was hard having to wait all day for Ford to finish working in his lab, he spent hours and hours immersed in those experiments that he didn't even realize it was time to sleep! The little Pines slept and Mr. Mystery too, oh but you missed your four eyes so much... So much so that there was no way he was going to get out unscathed after ignoring you all day.

Set: after portal thing, pre weirdmageddon.

GETTING TOUCHY IN THE LAB LET'S GOOO

Another Request nyehehe👏 Your idea inspired me anon, so I hope you like it! and everyone else too<3
